predicates.name: has_belgian_nationality_proof
predicates.description: The person provides proof of Belgian nationality.

predicates.name: is_foreigner
predicates.description: The person is a foreigner (vreemdeling): does not prove Belgian nationality.

predicates.name: is_union_citizen
predicates.description: The person is a citizen of the European Union.

predicates.name: falls_under_free_movement_law
predicates.description: The person falls under EU law on free movement as defined in Article 2(5) of the Schengen Borders Code.

predicates.name: is_third_country_national
predicates.description: The person is a third-country national: not an EU citizen and not covered by EU free movement law.

predicates.name: meets_entry_or_residence_conditions
predicates.description: The person currently meets the conditions for entry to or residence on the territory.

predicates.name: in_illegal_residence
predicates.description: The person is in illegal residence: present on the territory without meeting entry or residence conditions.

predicates.name: subject_to_removal_procedure
predicates.description: The person is subject to a removal procedure.

predicates.name: subject_to_international_protection_procedure
predicates.description: The person is subject to a procedure for granting international protection.

predicates.name: subject_to_responsibility_determination_procedure
predicates.description: The person is subject to a procedure to determine or transfer to the responsible member state for an international protection request.

predicates.name: individual_examination_performed
predicates.description: An individual examination has been performed for the person.

predicates.name: risk_of_absconding
predicates.description: There is a current and real risk that the person will abscond, established after individual examination on the basis of one or more objective criteria.

predicates.name: holds_valid_travel_document
predicates.description: The person holds a valid travel document, valid passport, or valid identity document.

predicates.name: recognised_by_national_authority_willing_to_issue_laissez_passer
predicates.description: The person has been recognised as a national by the national authority of their country, which declared willingness to issue a laissez-passer.

predicates.name: falls_under_nationality_category_for_ministerial_laissez_passer
predicates.description: The person falls under a nationality category for which the minister can issue a laissez-passer directly.

predicates.name: is_identified_foreigner
predicates.description: The person is an identified foreigner as defined: holds valid travel/identity document, or is recognised by national authority willing to issue laissez-passer, or falls under ministerial laissez-passer nationality category.

predicates.name: no_residence_application_filed_after_illegal_entry_or_during_illegal_stay
predicates.description: The person did not file a residence application after illegal entry or during illegal stay, or did not submit an international protection request within the legally prescribed period.

predicates.name: used_false_information_or_documents_in_procedure
predicates.description: The person used false or misleading information, false or forged documents, committed fraud, or used other unlawful means in a procedure for international protection, residence, removal, or pushback.

predicates.name: does_not_cooperate_with_authorities
predicates.description: The person does not cooperate or has not cooperated with authorities responsible for enforcement or supervision of regulations on entry, residence, establishment, and removal of foreigners.

predicates.name: indicated_unwillingness_to_comply_with_measure
predicates.description: The person has indicated unwillingness to comply with, or has already failed to comply with, a transfer, pushback, removal measure, entry ban, less coercive measure, or liberty-restricting measure.

predicates.name: subject_to_active_entry_ban
predicates.description: The person is subject to an entry ban in Belgium and/or another member state that has not been lifted or suspended.

predicates.name: filed_new_application_immediately_after_negative_decision
predicates.description: The person filed a new residence application or new international protection request immediately after being subject to a refusal of entry or residence, a decision ending their stay, or a pushback or removal measure.

predicates.name: concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_other_state
predicates.description: When questioned on the point, the person concealed that they had previously given fingerprints in another state bound by EU regulations on determining the state responsible for an international protection request.

predicates.name: multiple_applications_with_negative_or_no_title_outcome
predicates.description: The person has submitted multiple international protection requests and/or residence applications in Belgium or other member states that resulted in negative decisions or did not lead to the issuance of a residence permit.

predicates.name: concealed_prior_international_protection_request_in_other_state
predicates.description: When questioned on the point, the person concealed that they had previously submitted an international protection request in another state bound by EU regulations on determining the responsible state.

predicates.name: declared_or_file_shows_entry_for_other_purposes
predicates.description: The person declared or their file shows that they came to Belgium for purposes other than those for which they submitted an international protection request or residence application.

predicates.name: subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unfounded_appeal
predicates.description: The person is subject to a fine because they filed a manifestly unlawful appeal with the Council for Alien Law Litigation.

predicates.name: at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met
predicates.description: At least one of the objective criteria for risk of absconding is met for the person.

predicates.name: risk_of_absconding_is_current_and_real
predicates.description: The risk of absconding for the person is current and real, established after individual examination on the basis of at least one objective criterion.
